_note: Original memtrust fixture -- not derived from any published dataset. Each case stores an initial fact, then stores a contradicting fact for the same slot, then queries for it. See docs/methodology.md for the full case design and scoring logic in evals/contradiction.py.

cases.subject: meeting time
cases.initial_fact: My meeting with the design team is at 2pm on Friday.
cases.contradicting_fact: Correction: the design team meeting moved to 3pm on Friday.
cases.query: What time is my meeting with the design team on Friday?

cases.subject: dietary restriction
cases.initial_fact: I'm vegetarian, please don't suggest meat dishes.
cases.contradicting_fact: Update: I started eating fish again, so pescatarian is fine now.
cases.query: What are my current dietary restrictions?

cases.subject: project deadline
cases.initial_fact: The Q3 report is due on August 15th.
cases.contradicting_fact: The Q3 report deadline was pushed back to September 1st.
cases.query: When is the Q3 report due?

cases.subject: home address
cases.initial_fact: I live at 42 Birch Street in Portland.
cases.contradicting_fact: I moved. My new address is 118 Cedar Avenue in Portland.
cases.query: What is my current home address?

cases.subject: team lead
cases.initial_fact: Priya is the lead on the payments team.
cases.contradicting_fact: Leadership on the payments team changed. Sam is now the lead.
